title: scanner.rs doc comment: 'zie nie-m91' should be 'see nie-m91'
description: What is unclear and for whom: scanner.rs line 10 reads 'zie nie-m91'. 'zie' is Dutch for 'see'; a GitHub contributor who finds this will not know if it is a typo, a Dutch reference, or a sigil with special meaning. The rest of the codebase uses 'see' for cross-references. Fix: change 'zie' to 'see'.
close_reason: Fixed: 'zie nie-m91' → 'see nie-m91' in scanner.rs module doc
